package rulecoverage

func NegativeSprintfForSimpleIntToString() string {
    ruleID := "sprintf_for_simple_int_to_string"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`fmt.Sprintf(\"%d\", n)` where `n` is clearly an integer type"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
